analysis: Implemented a DualEncoder approach using microsoft/codebert-base. One encoder branch embeds the markdown cells, and the other embeds the structural boundaries (concatenating the previous code cell's ending and the next code cell's beginning). Softmax similarities are used to calculate the expected position of each markdown cell among the code boundaries. Trained on a 10,000 notebook subset using DataParallel on 2 H100 GPUs. The model achieved a significantly improved Kendall tau score of 0.8130, effectively acting as a soft continuous bipartite matching strategy.
